# Geotecnia — La Coruna

> Geotechnical engineering services in La Coruna, España.

## Services

## Contact
- Website: https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in La Coruna, España.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
